description: Create a content slide with a left-side survey question and a wide horizontal bar chart comparing likely vs unlikely by market for whether unemployment will be higher in 2025 than 2024, plus a change-vs-2023 column.

header.headline: Unemployment in my country will be higher in 2025 than in 2024
header.sub: For each of the following, please tell me how likely or unlikely you think they are to happen...?

sidebar.body:
Base: 23,721 adults aged 18 years and older in India, 18-74 in Canada, Republic of Ireland, Malaysia, the Philippines, South Africa, Turkey, and the United States, 20-74 in Thailand, 21-74 in Indonesia and Singapore, and 16-74 in all other countries.
Friday, October 25 – Friday November 8, 2024
